description: Canonical Slack slash-command delivery the bot expects on POST /slack/commands/evagene. `body` is the raw form-encoded request body (exactly the bytes in fixtures/slack-request.txt, newline-stripped). `signing_secret` is the Slack app's signing secret; `timestamp` is the value of X-Slack-Request-Timestamp; `signature_header` is what X-Slack-Signature should be for these bytes.

headers.X-Slack-Signature: v0=<compute HMAC_SHA256(signing_secret, 'v0:' + timestamp + ':' + body) at send time>
